ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_uri" TEXT /* URI or unique identifier for the organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the organization */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of the organization's address */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of the organization's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the organization is located */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the organization's address */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the organization */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the organization was created */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the organization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization managing the site */,
  "site_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the site */,
  "site_name_address" TEXT /* Name and address of the site */,
  "geo_x" REAL /* Geographical X-coordinate of the site */,
  "geo_y" REAL /* Geographical Y-coordinate of the site */,
  "site_plan_url" TEXT /* URL to the site plan */,
  "hectares" REAL /* Size of the site in hectares */,
  "ownership_status" TEXT /* Ownership status of the site */,
  "hazardous_substances" TEXT /* Presence of hazardous substances */,
  "planning_status" TEXT /* Planning status of the site */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission granted */,
  "permission_date" TEXT /* Date when permission was granted */,
  "planning_history_url" TEXT /* URL to the planning history */,
  "net_dwellings_range_from" INTEGER /* Minimum number of net dwellings proposed */,
  "net_dwellings_range_to" INTEGER /* Maximum number of net dwellings proposed */,
  "deliverable" TEXT /* Indicates if the site is deliverable */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or additional information about the site */,
  "first_added_date" TEXT /* Date when the site was first added to the system */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the site was last updated */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the site's record */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  "site_category" TEXT /* Category of the site (e.g., urban, rural, greenbelt) */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the site (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "planning_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each planning application */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site associated with the application */,
  "application_number" TEXT /* Number or reference of the planning application */,
  "application_description" TEXT /* Description of the proposed development */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of application (e.g., full planning permission, outline planning permission) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date when the decision was made */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Decision (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "decision_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the decision */,
  "consultation_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the public consultation period */,
  "consultation_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the public consultation period */,
  "consultation_comments" TEXT /* Comments received during the consultation period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_planning_applications_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the site owner */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the site owner */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the site owner */,
  "owner_type" TEXT /* Type of owner (e.g., private, public, company) */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the owner was added to the system */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the owner was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_ownerships" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "ownership_status" TEXT /* Ownership status (e.g., owned, leased, not owned by a public authority) */,
  "ownership_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the ownership started */,
  "ownership_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the ownership ended */,
  "lease_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the lease in years */,
  "rent_amount" REAL /* Amount of rent paid per annum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_ownerships_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES site_owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_ownerships_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental assessment */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of environmental assessment (e.g., soil, air, water) */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was conducted */,
  "assessment_result" TEXT /* Result of the assessment */,
  "assessment_report_url" TEXT /* URL to the assessment report */,
  "assessment_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the assessment findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_assessments_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "development_phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each development phase */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the development phase (e.g., planning, construction, completion) */,
  "phase_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the phase started */,
  "phase_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the phase is expected to end */,
  "phase_status" TEXT /* Status of the phase (e.g., in progress, completed, delayed) */,
  "phase_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the phase */,
  "phase_completion_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the phase that is complete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_development_phases_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site inspection */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date when the inspection was conducted */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "inspection_report_url" TEXT /* URL to the inspection report */,
  "defects_identified" TEXT /* List of defects identified during the inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_inspections_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planner, developer, inspector, public) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the site */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the site was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_comments_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was made */,
  "rating_score" INTEGER /* Score of the rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_ratings_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL to the document */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_documents_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)
